resources.string: Fire OS companion · passive arsenal · CYD bridge

HaleHound Fire is an educational and authorized security toolkit for Amazon Fire tablets.

• Use only on networks and devices you own or have written permission to test.
• Stock Fire OS cannot run ESP32 HaleHound firmware — this app is a companion + passive survey layer.
• Offensive radio modules (deauth, evil twin TX, sub-GHz replay, NFC clone, etc.) require a real ESP32 CYD with external modules.
• Unauthorized attacks on third-party networks are illegal.

By continuing you confirm legal, scoped, ethical use only.
No HaleHound CYD discovered on local network
Connect the CYD AP or join the same LAN, then Discover.
Passive / Blue Team mode (stock Fire OS)
